# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

<% content_for :title, @post.title %>

<div class="post">
  <header class="post-header">
    <h1><%= h @post.title %></h1>

    <div class="post-meta">
      <span class="post-author">By <%= h @post.user.name %></span>
      <span class="post-date"><%= l @post.created_at, format: :long %></span>
    </div>
  </header>

  <% if @post.respond_to?(:cover_image) && @post.cover_image.present? %>
    <div class="post-cover-image">
      <%= image_tag @post.cover_image, alt: @post.title %>
    </div>
  <% end %>

  <article class="post-content">
    <%= raw @post.content %>
  </article>

  <footer class="post-footer">
    <%= link_to "Back to Posts", posts_path, class: "back-link" %>
  </footer>
</div>
